title: Therapy With Zarna's Sons | #shorts
full_text: Guys, you don't need another therapist. You guys are upset and sad. I can see it on your face, but I'm very objective and neutral. >> Our mom is just way too controlled. >> He never lets us go anywhere. >> Where do you need to go? You don't need to go anywhere. >> What if I just want to go in and hang out with one of my friends? >> Hang out. >> Maybe go get food. Maybe go to his house. >> There is so much food in your house. I know your mother. There is so much dal rajma roti. >> Maybe me and her can watch a movie. >> Who her? Why do you have a woman friend? What's the difference between her and him? >> No, there is a difference. Men and women's cannot be extremely scientific opinion with lots of author back research. >> That's not what's important. What are we supposed to do about our controlling mother? >> Do you know how much your grandmother controls your mother? That's controlling. >> How do you know about that? >> So why would you take your grandmother's um perspective and put it on us? >> I'm saying you have it good. Just just be happy about that.
